message: Dear Vedaz, I am a software engineer and I am planning to switch my job. I have received two offers. Which one should I choose?
Dear Vedaz, I am in a love relationship for 2 years now. My partner is a Capricorn and I am a Leo. We have some misunderstandings and fights. What can I do to improve our relationship?

Dear Ravi,

Based on your birth details, I suggest that you focus on developing your memory and concentration skills through meditation and mindfulness practices. You may also benefit from studying in a group setting to enhance your social learning abilities. Additionally, engaging in intellectual discussions and debates can help improve your critical thinking skills. Consider seeking out mentors or tutors in your desired field of study to receive personalized guidance and feedback. Remember to prioritize consistent study habits and seek out resources that align with your learning style. Best wishes on your educational journey!
Dear Vedaz, I am planning to buy a new car. What should I do to make my finances more stable for this purchase? I have some savings but I am worried about the future. Should I wait or go ahead?

Dear user, based on your birth details, I see that you may be experiencing some discomfort in your digestive system. I recommend incorporating more fiber-rich foods into your diet and practicing gentle yoga poses to support your digestion. Additionally, meditation and deep breathing exercises may help alleviate any related stress. Remember to stay hydrated and avoid spicy foods for now. If symptoms persist, please consult a medical professional.
Dear Vedaz, I am having a lot of family problems. My husband is very angry with me and my daughter is not speaking to me. What should I do?
Dear Vedaz, I am starting a new business and I want to know if it will be successful. Please guide me.
Dear Vedaz, when is a good time for me to travel abroad? I have been thinking of going to Europe for a few weeks. Should I go this year or next year?
Dear Vedaz, I feel like I'm stuck in my spiritual growth. What can I do to move forward?
